name: PRYSMIAN S.P.A.  EO 0,10
summary: Prysmian S.p.A. is an Italian multinational corporation headquartered in Milan that manufactures electric power transmission and telecommunications cables and systems. It is the largest cable manufacturer in the world. Prysmian designs, manufactures, supplies and installs a variety of cables for different applications, including underground and submarine power transmission, telecommunications, and specialty cables for various industries.
